BRD.purpose: To outline what the business needs a new system or project to do to fulfill business goals.
BRD.input_required: Current challenges, project scope, "as-is" process, stakeholder needs,scope, Timeline,Constraints,Risk & mitigation,Cost,project objective,Technical Landscape,

NIT.purpose: To publicly invite suppliers or contractors to submit bids for a project or service.
NIT.input_required: Tender description, project purpose, estimated amount, eligibility criteria, forms to fill.

RFP.purpose: To solicit comprehensive proposals from potential vendors for a specific project or service.
RFP.input_required: Project background, technical requirements, evaluation criteria, budget expectations.

NDPR.purpose: To provide a high-level overview of a proposed project's viability before committing to a full Detailed Project Report.
NDPR.input_required: High-level cost estimates, basic technical viability, broad market analysis, initial risk assessment.

NFA.purpose: To seek formal internal management or financial approval for a specific decision, expenditure, or project phase.
NFA.input_required: Business justification, cost/budget availability, ROI or benefits, alternative options considered.
